info.title: Jobbers OneAPI
info.description: Jobbers OneAPI provides endpoints for managing clients, passes, conversations, messages, webhooks, tags, and enterprise statistics.

post.summary: Assign a pass to a client
Generate invoice for a pass (not implemented)

get.summary: Check if a client email exists
Get autologin token for a client

post.summary: Create a text or attachment message
Upload a file attachment to a conversation
Link a client to a location

delete.summary: Unlink a client from a location
